summary: Iteration 45 - Program Card Image Overlay Redesign COMPLETE. Verified NEW layout: Top-left=mode badges, Top-right=dates/times with gold duration badge below, Bottom-left=countdown timer, Bottom-right=exclusive offer badge (admin-toggleable RED). All features tested and working.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily enabled exclusive offer on Quad Layer Healing for testing, then disabled to restore original state
context_for_next_testing_agent: Program card overlay layout has been redesigned. New positions: dates/times at TOP-RIGHT (was bottom-right), duration badge gold below dates, countdown at BOTTOM-LEFT, exclusive offer badge at BOTTOM-RIGHT. Admin panel has red-bordered Exclusive Offer Badge section with toggle and text input.

verified_elements: Top-right: Dates stacked (Starts: 27 Mar 2026, Ends: 16 Apr 2026)
Top-right: Local timezone conversion in blue (3:30 PM - 4:30 PM UTC)
Top-right: Gold duration badge '21 Days' below dates
Bottom-right: Exclusive offer badge when enabled (RED, animated)
Top-right: Dates + timing + gold duration badge
Registration Closed overlay on closed programs
Exclusive offer badge at bottom-right when enabled

verified: Red-bordered section found in program edit form (line 364-370)
Text input appears when toggle is ON
Text input accepts custom text (tested: 'EXCLUSIVE 50% OFF')
Saves correctly and persists to database
Displays on frontend card at bottom-right in RED

tests: Add to Cart button adds item and shows checkmark
Card image click navigates to program detail page

registration_closed_overlay.verified: Shows on cards with enrollment_open=false or expired deadlines

early_bird_countdown_banner.verified: Shows in card body with 'EARLY BIRD SPECIAL ends in Xd Xh Xm'
